title: u4_compatibility
text: u4_compatibility Map segmented fields to the CLOB/BLOB data type and variable length fields to the LONG/LONG RAW data type in the U6.x connector. USYS$ORA_PARAMS = u4_compatibility Use This option applies only to the U6.x connector and above. Description Use with the U7.x connector to map segmented fields to the CLOB/BLOB data type and variable length fields to the LONG/LONG RAW data type, as in the U4.3 connector. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
